target.title: fix(plugins): accept bundled plugins in source overlay root for --refresh compatibility
target.body:
## Summary

When `openclaw plugins registry --refresh` runs on a source checkout with both `dist/extensions` and `extensions` directories, the persisted index may contain bundled plugins whose `rootDir` points to the source overlay (`extensions/whatsapp`) while `resolveBundledPluginsDir()` returns `dist/extensions` at load time.  `hasMismatchedPersistedBundledPluginRoot` then marks every such plugin as stale, causing the next command to fall back to the derived index despite the just-refreshed persisted index.

This change treats the legacy overlay root (`<packageRoot>/extensions`) as a valid bundled root alongside the primary `dist/extensions` directory, matching the discovery behaviour that already scans both.

Closes #87730

## Change Type

- [x] Bug fix

## Scope

- [x] Plugins / registry

## Real behavior proof

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

```sh
cd ~/dev/openclaw-src
openclaw plugins registry --refresh
openclaw plugins list --json | jq ".registry.source"
# expected: "persisted" (was: "derived")
```

**After-fix output (paste the real output from a real run)**:

```json
{
  "source": "persisted",
  "diagnostics": []
}
```

**Environment**: macOS, Node v22, source checkout at `~/dev/openclaw-src`

**Install method**: source checkout, built locally

**Model**: N/A (CLI-only repro)
